description: Deletes a Person for a given company and person ID

parameters.name: company_id
parameters.description:
Unique identifier for the company. This parameter accepts both formats:
- **Recommended**: Procore company ID (integer) - Use this for new integrations
- Legacy: LaborChart UUID format (uuid string...

schema.description: Response schema containing a unique identifier.

400.description: Bad Request - Invalid request parameters or missing required values.

401.description: Unauthorized - Missing or invalid authentication credentials.

403.description: Forbidden - User does not have the required permissions.

404.description: Not Found - The requested resource could not be located.
